title: Principal Frontend Developer at Saksoft Global Group

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Saksoft Global Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Saksoft Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Indore-based team.

About Saksoft Global Group:
Saksoft Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Saksoft Global Group!
